emails.subject:
FW: Please Approve New Product Type:  US Steel Cold Rolled Phy
 (2064)
emails.subject_base:
Please Approve New Product Type:  US Steel Cold Rolled Phy
 (2064)
emails.body: FW: Please Approve New Product Type: US Steel Cold Rolled Phy (2064) Tana/Kelly/Karen: The product long description below will fall under the new product type US Steel Cold Rolled Plate Phy. Credit (Tom Moran) has approved copying the profiles for the new product type from the following: US Steel Hot Rolled Phy Please respond no later than 10 a.m. on Wednesday, April 25. Thank you.
